name: beams
description: Cross-terminal message beam for Claude Code sessions. Shared-folder transport, hook-based delivery on prompt and at session start, no idle polling.

plugins.name: beams
plugins.description: Sessions sign in to named beams on a shared folder; messages are delivered on the next prompt and at session start via hooks, with an opt-in real-time channel that wakes an idle session. Works on a single machine or across machines that share storage (NFS/SMB/Syncthing/Dropbox).
